profile.name: Varun Raj Manoharan
profile.tagline: Reliable technology for ambitious founders. Built to scale, delivered on time.

gains.label: Goals
gains.content: Building FoundrySoft into a global software company. I'm helping 100 founders modernize their technology and scale their operations this year.

gains.label: Accomplishments
gains.content: I built a workflow to ship high-quality websites in 30 days. Most agencies make you choose between speed and design—I do both.

gains.label: Interests
gains.content: I'm a hardware and software tinkerer. I spend my time building AI agents, managing my own private cloud, and 3D printing parts for electronics projects.

gains.label: Networks
gains.content: Founders, e-commerce owners, and digital marketing agencies across India and Singapore.

gains.label: Skills
gains.content: Fixing slow or outdated websites. I rebuild them to be fast, stable, and professional so they actually help your business grow.

superpowers.title: Reliable Delivery
superpowers.description: I don't disappear on clients. I provide clear schedules and updates so you always know exactly what's happening with your project.

superpowers.title: AI Leverage
superpowers.description: I use AI to build in days what usually takes months. It helps my clients launch faster than their competition without cutting corners.

triggers: Our developer has stopped taking our calls and we can't update our site.
The site is so slow that customers are complaining.
We want to start selling globally but our technology can't handle it.
We're spending money on ads but the website isn't converting visitors into sales.
